initialOpenPositionInvestType.label: Position Size Type
initialOpenPositionInvestType.description: How the size of each opening trade is calculated.

initialOpenPositionInvestAmount.label: Position Size Amount
initialOpenPositionInvestAmount.description: Size value for the chosen type: a fraction for percent types (0.2 = 20% of cash), dollars for Fixed Dollar Amount, or a share count for Number of Shares.

recurring.label: Recurring Entries (DCA)
recurring.description: Keep adding to the position at set intervals while it stays open (dollar-cost averaging).

recurringPeriod.label: Bars Between Entries
recurringPeriod.description: Minimum number of bars to wait before each additional recurring entry.

recurringInvestType.label: Recurring Size Type
recurringInvestType.description: How the size of each recurring entry is calculated.

recurringInvestAmount.label: Recurring Size Amount
recurringInvestAmount.description: Size of each recurring entry, interpreted according to the Recurring Size Type (0.1 = 10% for percent types).

maxRecurringCount.label: Max Recurring Entries
maxRecurringCount.description: Maximum number of recurring entries per position. 0 = unlimited.

spread.label: Spread %
spread.description: Bid/ask spread applied to entry and exit prices (0.1 = 0.1%).

stopLossPercent.label: Stop Loss %
stopLossPercent.description: Closes the position if price falls this percent below entry (5 = 5%).

takeProfitPercent.label: Take Profit %
takeProfitPercent.description: Closes the position if price rises this percent above entry (10 = 10%).

minHoldBars.label: Minimum Hold (bars)
minHoldBars.description: Ignore the close condition for the first N bars after entry (0 = off). Stop loss and take profit still apply.

maxHoldBars.label: Max Hold (bars)
maxHoldBars.description: Force-close the position after holding for this many bars, regardless of conditions (0 = off).

reentryCooldownBars.label: Re-entry Cooldown (bars)
reentryCooldownBars.description: After closing, wait this many bars before a new position can be opened (0 = off).

initialOpenPositionInvestType.label: Position Size Type
initialOpenPositionInvestType.description: How the size of each opening short is calculated.

initialOpenPositionInvestAmount.label: Position Size Amount
initialOpenPositionInvestAmount.description: Size committed to the short for the chosen type: a fraction for percent types (0.2 = 20% of cash), dollars for Fixed Dollar Amount, or a share count for Number of Shares.

recurring.label: Recurring Entries
recurring.description: Keep adding to the short position at set intervals while it stays open.

recurringPeriod.label: Bars Between Entries
recurringPeriod.description: Minimum number of bars to wait before each additional recurring short entry.

recurringInvestType.label: Recurring Size Type
recurringInvestType.description: How the size of each recurring short entry is calculated.

recurringInvestAmount.label: Recurring Size Amount
recurringInvestAmount.description: Size of each recurring short entry, interpreted according to the Recurring Size Type (0.1 = 10% for percent types).

maxRecurringCount.label: Max Recurring Entries
maxRecurringCount.description: Maximum number of recurring short entries per position. 0 = unlimited.

spread.label: Spread %
spread.description: Bid/ask spread applied to entry and exit prices (0.1 = 0.1%).

stopLossPercent.label: Stop Loss %
stopLossPercent.description: Closes the short if price rises this percent above entry (5 = 5%) — shorts lose when price climbs.

takeProfitPercent.label: Take Profit %
takeProfitPercent.description: Closes the short if price falls this percent below entry (10 = 10%).

minHoldBars.label: Minimum Hold (bars)
minHoldBars.description: Ignore the close condition for the first N bars after entry (0 = off). Stop loss and take profit still apply.

maxHoldBars.label: Max Hold (bars)
maxHoldBars.description: Force-close the position after holding for this many bars, regardless of conditions (0 = off).

reentryCooldownBars.label: Re-entry Cooldown (bars)
reentryCooldownBars.description: After closing, wait this many bars before a new position can be opened (0 = off).
